title: To prove the anti-AI Pope’s words were human, his camp used AI
summary: Finkel frames the certification as the whole point of the venture. “With the Pope’s attention squarely on the question of AI and human authorship, it tells you this isn’t a niche debate anymore,” he said. “It’s the defining question of our time.”…
